blog_title: T-Shirt Color Bleeding in Monsoon — Reactive vs Pigment Dye Mistake That Ruined 200 Pieces
caption:
200 navy tees. Rain-soaked. White prints completely bled out. ₹40k loss. 😬

Why? The supplier used pigment dye instead of reactive dye. Pigment sits on the surface. Reactive bonds inside the fiber.

Dark colors bleed worst in monsoon. Test before ordering: rub wet cloth on sample. If color transfers, it's pigment dye.

Save this post before your next bulk order 👇
